basic_details.job_title: CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 16 Project JRF, Project Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Institute of Himalayan Bioresource Technology (CSIR IHBT)
basic_details.post_name: Project JRF, Project Assistant, Project Associate -I, Project Associate PAT -I, Senior-PAT, Junior Project Fellow, Project Associate PAT-II
basic_details.short_information: Institute of Himalayan Bioresource Technology (CSIR IHBT) has released the official Project JRF, Project Assistant, Project Associate-I, Project Associate PAT-I, Senior-PAT, Junior Project Fellow, and Project Associate PAT-II Recruitment 2026 notification on the official website. A total of 16 vacancies have been announced under the CSIR IHBT Project Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years with a qualification of M.Sc. in Botany, Biotechnology, or equivalent with national-level JRF eligibility such as NET, GATE, etc. can attend the walk-in interview as per the recruitment sch

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for most posts. Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for Senior-PAT. Age Relaxation: 05 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women, 03 years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Botany & Biotechnology or equivalent with national level JRF eligibility test (NET, GATE etc.)
qualification.details: Project JRF: M.Sc. in Botany & Biotechnology or equivalent with national level JRF eligibility test (NET, GATE etc.). Desirable: Work experience in Molecular Biological techniques. Project Assistant: B.Sc. in Botany & Biotechnology/Biochemistry or equivalent. Desirable: Work experience in Molecular Biological techniques. Project Associate -I (GAP-0376): M.Sc. in Biotechnology/ Plant Sciences/ Molecular Biology and Biotechnology/ Botany from a recognized University. Desirable: Work experience in Plant Cell and organ culture/ Secondary metabolite production/ Molecular biology techniques like PCR, qPCR/ basic biochemical profiling techniques in medical plants with proven experience in the form of research publications. Project Associate PAT -I (MMP025302): M.Sc. in Microbiology/ Microbial Biotechnology/ Industrial Microbiology from a recognized University. Desirable: Experience in basic Laboratory analytical techniques Microbial handling techniques, Antimicrobials. assays, Microbial identification techniques Project Associate PAT-I (GAP0322): M.Sc. in Microbiology/ Biotechnology from a recognized University. Desirable: Candidates having hands on experience in handling microbes, enzymes and fermentation techniques will be preferred. Project Associate-I (GAP0377): Four years Bachelor's degree/ Master's Degree in Biotechnology/ Microbiology/ Botany/ Biochemistry/ Plant Sciences, Plant Pathology/ or Agricultural Sciences/ BTech Biotechnology from a recognized University. Desirable: Expertise in biochemistry, Plant cell culture, plant pathology tools for plant virology, plant microbe interaction and molecular biology. Project Associate-I (GAP0377): M.Sc. in Bioinformatics or Computational Biology from a recognized University. Desirable: Expertise in running Gromacs script. Project Associate PAT-I (GAP-0373): Master's Degree in Agronomy/ Agriculture/ Horticulture/ Floriculture from a recognized university. Desirable: Work Experience in Agriculture/ Horticulture/ Horticulture extension work. Senior-PAT (GAP-0373): Master's degree in Agronomy/ Agriculture/ Horticulture (Floriculture) from a recognized University and 3 years' experience in R&D OR Doctoral Degree in Agronomy/ Agriculture/ Horticulture (Floriculture) from a recognized University and 2 years' experience in R&D. Desirable: Work experience in extension and R&D in agricultural/ floricultural crops with proven experience in form of research publication in peer reviewed journals will be preferred. Junior Project Fellow (GAP0378): M.Sc. Botany/ Plant Sciences/ Environmental Sciences from a recognized University. Desirable: 1) Experience in field Surveys for plant exploration in High Altitude Areas. 2) Knowledge of ecological methods. Project Associate PAT-I (GAP-0370): Master's Degree in Agronomy/Agriculture/ Horticulture/ Floriculture from a recognized university. Desirable: Work Experience in Agriculture/ Horticulture/ Horticulture extension work. Project Associate PAT-I (GAP0375): Masters / Integrated Masters degree in Chemistry or Biochemistry or Phytochemistry or Organic Chemistry from a recognized University. Desirable: Working Knowledge in the area of Natural Product Chemistry, Analytical Techniques, in vitro cell lines and experimental animals handling. Project Associate PAT -I (GAP-0366): M.Sc. in Food Science & Technology/ M.Sc. in Biotechnology/ M.Sc. in Biochemistry/ M.Sc. in Microbiology from a recognized University. Desirable: Experience in Food product Development Frequent travel to Chamba for data collection & Analytical techniques. Project Associate PAT-II (SSP-0185): M.Sc. in Biochemistry/ Biotechnology from a recognized University with 02 years of Research Experience. Desirable: Experience in Microalgae cultivation & Biostimulant/ Biofertilizer applications. Project Associate PAT-I (SSP-0185): M.Sc. Chemistry/ M. Pharma from a recognized University. Desirable: Experience in Natural Product Chemistry.

salary_details.details: Project JRF: Rs. 37,000/- + 9%HRA (1st & 2nd year), Rs. 42,000/- + 9% HRA (3rd year) Project Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- + 9%HRA Project Associate -I: (a) Rs. 37,000/- + 10%HRA (for qualified candidates) (b) Rs. 30,000/- + 10%HRA (for others) Project Associate PAT -I: Rs. 25,000/- + 10%HRA Project Associate PAT-I: (a) Rs. 31,000/- + 9%HRA (for qualified candidates) (b) Rs. 25,000/- + 9%HRA (for others) Project Associate-I: (a) Rs. 37,000/- + 10%HRA (for qualified candidates) (b) Rs. 30,000/- + 10%HRA (for others) Project Associate-I: (a) Rs. 37,000/- + 10%HRA (for qualified candidates) (b) Rs. 30,000/- + 10%HRA (for others) Project Associate PAT-I: (a) Rs. 31,000/- + 10%HRA (for qualified candidates) (b) Rs. 25,000/- + 10%HRA (for others) Senior-PAT: Rs. 42,000/- + 10%HRA Junior Project Fellow: Rs. 24,000/- + 10% HRA Project Associate PAT-I: (a) Rs. 31,000/- + 10%HRA (for qualified candidates) (b) Rs. 25,000/- + 10%HRA (for others) Project Associate PAT-I: Rs. 30,000/- + 10%HRA Project Associate PAT -I: Rs. 25,000/- + 10%HRA Project Associate PAT-II: Rs. 28,000/- + HRA Project Associate PAT-I: Rs. 25,000/- + HRA

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Objective test (MCQ) followed by interview (if adopted by selection committee)

content_sections.heading: CSIR IHBT Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR IHBT Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in Interview Objective test (MCQ) followed by interview (if adopted by selection committee)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR IHBT Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled to be held on multiple dates from 20th July 2026 to 23rd July 2026. Candidates should check the specific dates for the post they are interested in.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project JRF position?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Project JRF position is an M.Sc. in Botany & Biotechnology or an equivalent degree, along with eligibility in a national-level JRF test like NET or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 16 vacancies announced for various project-based positions at the Institute of Himalayan Bioresource Technology (CSIR IHBT).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for most of the posts is 35 years, with a relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and 3 years for OBC candidates. The Senior-PAT post has a maximum age limit of 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project JRF position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project JRF position is Rs. 37,000/- + 9% HRA for the first and second years, and Rs. 42,000/- + 9% HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for these positions is Walk-in. Candidates need to appear for a walk-in interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be conducted at the CSIR IHBT office located in Palampur, Himachal Pradesh, Pin Code: 176061.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies of their age proof, educational qualifications, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of CSIR IHBT?
faq.answer: The official website of the Institute of Himalayan Bioresource Technology (CSIR IHBT) is www.ihbt.res.in, where candidates can find more information and the application form.

faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled to be held on multiple dates from 20th July 2026 to 23rd July 2026. Candidates should check the specific dates for the post they are interested in.
